crons.name: IHSG Daily Market Scanner
crons.task: Scan IHSG market conditions, analyze top movers, technical signals for watchlist stocks, and push formatted report to WhatsApp group

crons.name: LQ45 Dividend Hunter
crons.task: Analyze LQ45 stocks for upcoming dividends, ex-dates, yields, and accumulation opportunities

crons.name: BEI IPO Tracker
crons.task: Track upcoming IPOs on BEI, analyze prospectus highlights, and flag interesting opportunities

crons.name: Quarterly Earnings Monitor
crons.task: Check for new quarterly/annual financial reports from portfolio holdings (BMRI, BBRI, TLKM, PWON, UNVR, SIDO, CDIA) and provide analysis

crons.name: Monthly Finance Report
crons.task: Generate monthly expense breakdown by category (%), compare with previous month, flag anomalies, push to WhatsApp and append to Google Sheet
